abilities.name: contrary
abilities.effect: Whenever this Pokémon's stats would be raised, they are instead lowered by the same amount, and vice versa.
abilities.flavorText: Reverses any stat changes affecting the Pokémon so that attempts to boost its stats instead lower them—and attempts to lower its stats will boost them.

abilities.name: suction-cups
abilities.shortEffect: Prevents being forced out of battle by other Pokémon's moves.
abilities.effect: This Pokémon cannot be forced out of battle by moves such as Whirlwind. Dragon Tail and Circle Throw still inflict damage against this Pokémon. Overworld: If the lead Pokémon has this ability, the success rate while fishing is increased.
abilities.flavorText: The Pokémon uses suction cups to stay in one spot. This protects it from moves and items that would force it to switch out.

abilities.name: infiltrator
abilities.shortEffect: Bypasses Light Screen, Reflect, and Safeguard.
abilities.effect: This Pokémon's moves ignore Light Screen, Reflect, and Safeguard.
abilities.flavorText: The Pokémon's moves are unaffected by the target's barriers, substitutes, and the like.
